code_refs.description: Extension entry point: activate(), deactivate(), server spawn, workspace resolution, status bar, all command registrations.
TicketTreeProvider: TreeDataProvider grouped by state, dependency maps, lazy tooltip resolution, on-disk folder browsing.
Typed HTTP client for the ticket-viewer REST API: read and mutation endpoints, cursor pagination, error handling.
BrowserBridge: localhost HTTP control server, Simple Browser navigation, Playwright/CDP page automation.
